description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a predominantly white exterior and a black screen bezel. The front panel displays a large screen with the 'Super Smash Bros. Ultimate' logo, and a control panel below it with colorful buttons and joysticks. The side panels are adorned with vibrant graphics of iconic video game characters such as Sonic, Mario, Pikachu, Pac-Man, and others, creating a lively and nostalgic visual appeal. The lower front section includes a black access door, likely for maintenance or coin collection. The cabinet's overall structure is boxy with a slightly angled marquee at the top, which also displays the 'Super Smash Bros. Ultimate' branding. The materials appear to be a combination of painted wood or MDF, plastic, and glass for the screen.
description: A white upright arcade game cabinet with 'Super Smash Bros. Ultimate' branding, colorful side graphics of famous video game characters, and a control panel with buttons and joysticks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen with 'Super Smash Bros. Ultimate' logo, control panel with buttons and joysticks, and a black access door at the bottom.
description_view_1: Right side view featuring large, colorful graphics of Sonic, Pac-Man, Steve from Minecraft, Cloud, and Ryu.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned white back panel with no visible graphics or features.
description_view_3: Left side view with graphics of Mario, Pikachu, Kirby, and Link, adding to the cabinet's vibrant appearance.
attribute_screen_type: Unknown, but likely a flat LCD or LED display with a rectangular shape and visible bezel.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and six colored buttons, symmetrically arranged, with a simple white background and red/green button colors.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'Super Smash Bros. Ultimate' logo in black and red on a white background, matching the cabinet's overall theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels are decorated with large, colorful images of popular video game characters including Mario, Sonic, Pikachu, Kirby, Link, Pac-Man, Steve, Cloud, and Ryu, creating a vibrant and playful theme.
